chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Allegiance of the Freed Slave

text: 3501 - وَ رَوَى حُذَيْفَةُ بْنُ مَنْصُورٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : "اَلْمُعْتِقَ هُوَ اَلْمَوْلَى وَ اَلْوَلَدُ يَنْتَمِي إِلَى مَنْ يَشَاءُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3501 - Hudhayfah ibn Mansur narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"The one who frees (a slave) is the mawla (master), and the child associates himself with whomever he wishes."
